name: Hextech Corruption
description: An organic, cellular anomaly pattern inspired by the Hextech corruption in Arcane. Features glowing iridescent cores and a warping void shell.

schema.label: Anomaly Density
schema.description: Number of organic cells in the corruption pattern.

schema.label: Shimmer Pulse
schema.description: How fast the internal cores pulse and shimmer.

schema.label: Core Instability
schema.description: How much the cells warp and distort over time.

schema.label: Shell Contrast
schema.description: How dark the outer 'void' shell appears against the glowing cores.
